name: Rope, 1” hemp, per ft  (1,125 lb cap.)

system.docHtml: Hemp rope is twisted from the fibers of the hemp plant, stiff and strong. A single fist-thick cord of one-inch hemp will bear the weight of a loaded wagon without complaint, though it grows brittle and frays in water left standing. Road wardens, drovers, and builders coil vast lengths of it; a merchant’s hemp is often tarred against the weather of a long march.
